overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring the ancient Port of Piraeus. The character walks through a bustling market with classical Greek architecture, passes NPCs, and climbs a rocky hillside to reach a scenic viewpoint overlooking the harbor and a distant temple.
